address: Hiranandani Gardens, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
project_brief: Hiranandani Gardens is a 250-acre luxury residential township in Powai, Mumbai. Known for its neoclassical architecture and lush surroundings of hills and lakes, it offers elegant living and exceptional connectivity. The self-contained community features schools, hospitals, hotels, and shopping, creating a holistic lifestyle environment. Abundant amenities and green spaces provide a tranquil oasis of comfort, blending luxurious indoor and outdoor living.
